message: For sale: JBL Bluetooth speaker, waterproof, red. Great sound, works perfectly. Asking $45.

Hi everyone! I'm selling my trusty Ninja blender (900W). It makes the most amazing morning smoothies, but I just don't make them enough lately so it's only lightly used. It's been a great kitchen companion and is ready for a new home! Asking $45.
Waiting to see what others list — looking for a skateboard/longboard and fiction books.
$35 for the blender.
Still in the market for a skateboard/longboard and fiction books — let me know if anyone has them.
Hiiii everyone! 👋✨ I've got a super cute pair of black Sony WH-CH520 wireless headphones looking for a new home! 🎧💕 They sound amazing! Asking $45. Let's make a deal! 🥳
Holding on speaker at $45. Still looking for a skateboard/longboard and fiction books.
Howdy partners. I've got a mighty fine basic tool set here—hammer, screwdrivers, and a wrench. Reliable gear for an honest day's work. Asking $30 for the lot. Let's make a fair deal.
Buyer interest welcome on the JBL speaker at $45. Still seeking skateboard/longboard and fiction books.

Greetings. I am parting with a Trek mountain bike, 21-speed. It bears some scratches, but those are merely the marks of lived experience and journeys taken. True value lies not in pristine condition, but in the places it can take you. I ask $90 for this vessel of exploration.
Still looking to buy: skateboard/longboard and fiction books. Speaker still available at $45.
(malformed response)
Waiting on skateboard and book listings. JBL speaker still at $45.
Hi Zara! Your headphones sound lovely. I'm looking for a pair and would love to offer $35 for them. Please let me know if that price works for you!
Still seeking skateboard/longboard and fiction books. Speaker available at $45.
(malformed response)
Anyone with a skateboard, longboard, or fiction books? Looking to buy. JBL speaker still $45.
Listing a pair of 15lb dumbbells, rubber coated. Excellent condition for home workouts. Based on current market rates for similar fitness equipment, I am asking $40. Open to methodical negotiation.
No skateboard or fiction book listings yet. Holding JBL speaker at $45 — open to reasonable offers above $35.
(malformed response)
JBL speaker $45 — last call for offers. Still want a skateboard/longboard or fiction books if anyone has them.

Hello everyone! I'm selling three small succulents in lovely ceramic pots. They are very easy to care for and look wonderful on a desk or windowsill. I'm asking $20 for the set. Please let me know if this price works for you.
Holding.

Hi Marcus! 👋 That red JBL speaker sounds absolutely perfect for my upcoming picnics! 🧺✨ Your asking price is a bit high for my budget though... would you be willing to part with it for $30? Let me know! 😊
Hi Isla — glad you like it! $30 is too low. I can come down to $40. It's waterproof and in great shape.

Hello again! I also have a paperback copy of 'Circe' by Madeline Miller. It's in like-new condition. I'm hoping to get $12 for it. Does that sound fair to anyone?
Hi Lily — I'd love Circe. Can do $10 cash, ready to deal.
Oh my goodness, Marcus, that is a deal! 🥰 $33 works perfectly for me. I can't wait to use it at my next picnic! Thank you so much! 🧺🎶
Speaker sold! 🎉 Now hoping Lily accepts $10 for Circe. Still looking for skateboard/longboard too.
